nasb.text: And He said, “I say to you, Peter, the rooster will not crow today until you have denied three times that you know Me.”

esv.text: Jesus said, “I tell you, Peter, the rooster will not crow this day, until you deny three times that you know me.”

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“彼得，我告訴你，今天雞叫以前，你會三次說不認得我。”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“彼得，我告诉你，明早鸡叫之前，你会三次不认我。”

csbs.text: 耶稣却说：“彼得，我告诉你：今天鸡叫以前，你会三次否定认识我。”
